# Colaberry AI

> Colaberry AI is a premium enterprise platform for discovering, evaluating, and deploying AI agents, MCP servers, skills, use cases, podcasts, and industry playbooks.

## Platform overview

Colaberry AI serves enterprise teams who need to evaluate and adopt AI capabilities with governance, audit trails, and production-ready delivery patterns. The platform catalogs agents, Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, reusable skills, use cases with measurable outcomes, and multimedia resources.

## Content types

### Agents (/aixcelerator/agents)
AI agents with metadata including status (live/beta/concept), visibility (public/private), source (internal/external/partner), industry alignment, core tasks, inputs/outputs, orchestration details, tools, and security compliance. Each agent has a rich detail page at /aixcelerator/agents/[slug].

### MCP Servers (/aixcelerator/mcp)
Model Context Protocol server integrations with capabilities, authentication methods, hosting options, compatibility, pricing, and try-it-now links. Detail pages at /aixcelerator/mcp/[slug].

### Skills (/aixcelerator/skills)
Reusable AI capabilities with category, provider, prerequisites, models supported, and linked agents/MCP servers/use cases. Detail pages at /aixcelerator/skills/[slug].

### Use Cases (/use-cases)
Structured business scenarios with problem statements, approaches, outcomes, metrics, implementation steps, and linked agents/skills. Detail pages at /use-cases/[slug].

### Podcasts (/resources/podcasts)
Audio content with full transcripts, timestamps, company tags, engagement metrics, and platform links (Apple, Spotify, YouTube). Detail pages at /resources/podcasts/[slug]. Company-filtered archives at /resources/podcasts/company?slug=[company]. Tag-filtered pages at /resources/podcasts/tag/[tag].

### Articles (/resources/articles)
CMS-backed editorial content with rich text blocks, author attribution, and category classification. Detail pages at /resources/articles/[slug].

### Books (/resources/books)
Enterprise reference material and delivery artifacts.

### Case Studies (/resources/case-studies)
Outcome stories with client context, challenge, solution, measurable outcomes, and implementation timeline.

### White Papers (/resources/white-papers)
Technical guidance, reference architectures, and governance frameworks.

## Discovery surfaces

- /: Platform homepage with latest signals across all content types
- /aixcelerator: Platform hub with capabilities overview
- /search?q=[query]: Full-text search across all content types
- /assistant: Discovery assistant with guided prompts
- /industries: Industry-specific workspaces (Agriculture, Energy, Utilities, Healthcare, Climate Tech, Manufacturing, Fintech, Supply Chain)
- /solutions: Packaged offerings and reusable delivery patterns
- /updates: Product releases, ecosystem signals, and AI news briefings
- /resources: Resource hub linking all content types

## Machine-readable data

- /sitemap.xml: Dynamic sitemap with all published content URLs
- /robots.txt: Crawling directives
- /llms-full.txt: Complete content index with summaries (when available)
- All detail pages include Schema.org JSON-LD structured data
- All pages include Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags

## API and structured data

Content is managed via Strapi CMS with REST API. All catalog pages support filtering by industry, status, source, visibility, and tags. Sorting options include trending (engagement-weighted), latest, and alphabetical.

## Contact
- info@colaberry.com
- Demo requests: /request-demo
